mathmodels 0.0.9
  • Reference
    • Getting Started with mathmodels
    • 📖 使用手册 (Online Book)
  • News

SI Epidemic Model

Source: R/diffEq_models.R
model_si.Rd

Two-compartment model with no recovery: $$\frac{dS}{dt} = -\beta S I$$ $$\frac{dI}{dt} = \beta S I$$

Usage

model_si(init, params, times, ...)

Arguments

init

Named numeric vector, e.g. c(S = 990, I = 10).

params

Named numeric vector, e.g. c(beta = 0.002).

beta

Transmission rate (contacts per individual per time).

times

Numeric vector of output times.

...

Additional arguments passed to ode_solver.

Value

A data.frame with columns time, S, I.

Details

Population size \(N = S + I\) is conserved.

Examples

model_si(
  init   = c(S = 990, I = 10),
  params = c(beta = 0.002),
  times  = seq(0, 30, by = 0.1)
)
#>     time            S          I
#> 1    0.0 9.900000e+02   10.00000
#> 2    0.1 9.878130e+02   12.18705
#> 3    0.2 9.851548e+02   14.84524
#> 4    0.3 9.819274e+02   18.07262
#> 5    0.4 9.780140e+02   21.98598
#> 6    0.5 9.732763e+02   26.72367
#> 7    0.6 9.675517e+02   32.44834
#> 8    0.7 9.606502e+02   39.34979
#> 9    0.8 9.523532e+02   47.64681
#> 10   0.9 9.424116e+02   57.58841
#> 11   1.0 9.305470e+02   69.45305
#> 12   1.1 9.164546e+02   83.54539
#> 13   1.2 8.998107e+02  100.18925
#> 14   1.3 8.802842e+02  119.71578
#> 15   1.4 8.575544e+02  142.44557
#> 16   1.5 8.313359e+02  168.66405
#> 17   1.6 8.014092e+02  198.59080
#> 18   1.7 7.676565e+02  232.34354
#> 19   1.8 7.300990e+02  269.90100
#> 20   1.9 6.889305e+02  311.06954
#> 21   2.0 6.445396e+02  355.46037
#> 22   2.1 5.975151e+02  402.48492
#> 23   2.2 5.486261e+02  451.37391
#> 24   2.3 4.987801e+02  501.21985
#> 25   2.4 4.489585e+02  551.04148
#> 26   2.5 4.001406e+02  599.85941
#> 27   2.6 3.532284e+02  646.77159
#> 28   2.7 3.089833e+02  691.01672
#> 29   2.8 2.679838e+02  732.01623
#> 30   2.9 2.306090e+02  769.39098
#> 31   3.0 1.970436e+02  802.95637
#> 32   3.1 1.673014e+02  832.69862

#> 34   3.3 1.186920e+02  881.30799
